utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: That is right , still no baby ! Come on people ! Please make some room !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh sweetie , maybe you would be more comfortable here ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You . Like you have not done enough .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , I ... I know how miserable you are , I wish there was something I can do .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean I wish I were a seahorse .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Because with seahorses it is the male , they carry the babies .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And then also umm , I would be far away in the sea .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: God . I have never been so uncomfortable in my entire life !

emotion_cause.span: 8_I have never been so uncomfortable in my entire life !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh I know , I have been there . I remember toward the end

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh Phoebe , that is a great story .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Can you tell it to me when you are getting me some iced tea ?
